overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a Divination classroom in a wizarding school (Hogwarts Legacy), featuring students seated around low tables with crystal balls. The circular room has stone walls, Gothic arched windows with purple drapes, and a large tapestry. One student walks across the foreground while others remain seated.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular divination classroom with crystal ball tables

events.description: A student in wizard robes walks from the right foreground to the left, passing between the camera and the seated students

agents.ego_description: Stationary observation of the classroom scene from a fixed position near the entrance

notable_agents.action: walking across the foreground from right to left, wearing dark wizard robes and a pointed hat
seated student holding a teacup and gazing at a crystal ball on the table

entered.detail: Large wall tapestry depicting a robed wizard with a crystal ball against a starry blue background
Tall Gothic arched window with stone tracery allowing sunlight to stream into the room
Heavy purple drapes framing the arched windows on both sides
Low circular table with a glowing crystal ball sitting on top
Wooden table surrounded by cushioned seating where students are gathered
Round pink upholstered ottoman in the immediate foreground
Grey stone block walls with Gothic architectural details and arches
Framed artwork hanging on the stone wall to the right of the windows

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary in a circular Gothic-style divination classroom, capturing students seated on cushions around low tables with crystal balls. Warm afternoon light filters through tall arched windows draped with heavy purple curtains. A large tapestry hangs on the left wall. At approximately 3.5 seconds, a student in dark robes walks across the foreground from right to left, temporarily obscuring the view of the seated students who continue their activities.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary perspective within a circular Gothic divination classroom, where a moment of quiet study is briefly interrupted by a passing figure. It begins with a wide view of students seated on cushions around low tables, their crystal balls illuminated by warm afternoon light filtering through tall arched windows and heavy purple drapes. As the scene unfolds, a large tapestry remains visible on the left wall while the students continue their focused activities. The stillness is then broken as a student in dark robes walks across the foreground from right to left, temporarily obscuring the view of the classroom before the space returns to its original state of calm.
